RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
N : ℕ
hN : ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hmn : m ≥ n
M1 M2 : ℕ
M : ℕ := M1 + M2
hM1 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f n) a b N) M - ℓ n| < ε / 4
hM2 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f m) a b N) M - ℓ m| < ε / 4
hNn : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
hNm : |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
⊢ |ℓ m - ℓ n| ≤
    |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
      |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m|

proof:
have h1 : ℓ m - ℓ n = (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
      (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) := by ring
    calc |ℓ m - ℓ n| = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
      (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by rw [h1]
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
      |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        apply add_le_add_right
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        apply add_le_add_right
        exact abs_add _ _
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) _, abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) _]
        ring
